Step 1 of 4

What application are you drilling for?

Select the drilling type that best matches your project.

Step 2 of 4

Select your ground condition

Choose the system that matches your ground condition.

Step 2 of 4

Speak to a specialist

This application involves highly variable conditions. Our team will help you design the right program.

📞

Let's talk about your project

Geotech and oilfield/geothermal/other applications involve highly variable ground conditions. A Blick specialist will design the right fluid program for your specific job.

Talk to a Blick Specialist
Step 3 of 4

Enter your bore specifications

We'll use these to estimate fluid volumes and product quantities.

Select a preset or enter a custom value
mm
Please enter a bore diameter.
m
Please enter a bore depth.
Drop it in and we'll attach this program to your account — so when you call in to refine it, we're already up to speed.
